'''ragotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatization|sabbatization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatization|sabbatization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ragotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægetheth|rægetheth]] || [[word:rægethej|rægethej]] || [[word:rægethesh|rægethesh]] || [[word:rægethe|rægethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragogothoth|ragogothoth]] || [[word:ragogothoj|ragogothoj]] || [[word:ragogothosh|ragogothosh]] || [[word:ragogotho|ragogotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragothoth|ragothoth]] || [[word:ragothoj|ragothoj]] || [[word:ragothosh|ragothosh]] || [[word:ragotho|ragotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragofthoth|ragofthoth]] || [[word:ragofthoj|ragofthoj]] || [[word:ragofthosh|ragofthosh]] || [[word:ragofthof|ragofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragothotho|ragothotho]] || [[word:ragothojo|ragothojo]] || [[word:ragothosho|ragothosho]] || [[word:ragothoko|ragothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragothoth|ragothoth]] || [[word:ragothoj|ragothoj]] || [[word:ragothosh|ragothosh]] || [[word:ragotho|ragotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragothothol|ragothothol]] || [[word:ragothojol|ragothojol]] || [[word:ragothoshol|ragothoshol]] || [[word:ragothokol|ragothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragothothotho|ragothothotho]] || [[word:ragothojojo|ragothojojo]] || [[word:ragothoshosho|ragothoshosho]] || [[word:ragothoko|ragothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragothothon|ragothothon]] || [[word:ragothojon|ragothojon]] || [[word:ragothoshon|ragothoshon]] || [[word:ragothokon|ragothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragothothoro|ragothothoro]] || [[word:ragothojoro|ragothojoro]] || [[word:ragothoshoro|ragothoshoro]] || [[word:ragothokoro|ragothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
